text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've spent three years with Matikanefukukitaru. It
was long in essence, and yet, the time went by in
a flash. Today, everything comes to a close.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You know what, Trainer? We sure had the
happiest of times. On top of that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is just the perfect time to wrap things up!
Getting to finish with a New Year's shrine visit is
just perfect!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Right! We're always on the same page, always in
sync—like dancers or synchronized swimmers.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, let's get praying. Now, let me find some
money for the offering box...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, arghhhhh! I don't have any change on me!
Trainer, please lend me a few coins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is still the same as
ever—always causing a fuss, but endearing to the
point you just can't fault her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I place my hands together and wish for her
continued success.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What did you pray for? You can tell me. Just
whisper it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hey, no fair! Why can't you tell me? Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, I choose to be an open book! There's only
one thing I want, after all.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: My wish is for you to receive lots of good luck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru only has one wish. And that
wish is for me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I also wish for you to tell me what you wished for!
